violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Working containers of sugar are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Pastry items packaged in the food establishment, set for sale on the counter for customer selection, were observed to be lacking sufficient information on the labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The grease dumpster outside is located on grass/dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The floors in the back storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Food items repackaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap (Currently equipped with an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The grease dumpster outside is located on grass/dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

Pastry items packaged in the food establishment, set for sale on the counter for customer selection, were observed to be lacking sufficient information on the labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. (Per the PIC, labels are available at another location.) Food items were moved to the back counter for service to customers at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
Food items in the walk-in freezer were observed stored on the floor (lacking storage racks/shelving. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
